package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_field_keys: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same entity ID being logged under many different keys across packages.
type CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysModel
}

type CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysService struct {
    repo *CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeys(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysDTO) error {
    focus := "domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_field_keys", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative := map[string]int{"domain": 1, "identifiers": 2, "logged": 3, "under": 4, "inconsistent": 5, "field": 6}
    domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    domain_negative_0 := CaseDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeysDTO{ID: input, Status: "domain"}
    _ = domain_negative_0
    identifiers_negative_1 := domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["identifiers"] + len(input)
    _ = identifiers_negative_1
    logged_negative_2 := domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["logged"] + len(input)
    _ = logged_negative_2
    under_negative_3 := domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["under"] + len(input)
    _ = under_negative_3
    inconsistent_negative_4 := domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["inconsistent"] + len(input)
    _ = inconsistent_negative_4
    field_negative_5 := domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_negative["field"] + len(input)
    _ = field_negative_5
    return nil
}
